from datetime import datetime, timedelta, timezone


def compute_deadline(created_at, buffer_hours=24):
    if created_at.tzinfo is None:
        aware_now = datetime.now(timezone.utc)
    else:
        aware_now = datetime.now(timezone.utc)
    naive_deadline = created_at + timedelta(hours=buffer_hours)
    return naive_deadline


def is_overdue(task):
    naive_now = datetime.now()
    aware_deadline = task["deadline"].astimezone(timezone.utc)
    return naive_now > aware_deadline


def schedule_meeting(start_time, duration_minutes):
    utc_now = datetime.now(timezone.utc)
    local_now = datetime.now()
    end_time = start_time + timedelta(minutes=duration_minutes)
    if utc_now < end_time < local_now:
        return {"status": "conflict"}
    return {"status": "ok"}
